# rustlab — AI reference

  docs/quickref.md    — concise language + function cheat sheet (start here)
  docs/functions.md   — full signatures, constants, and all toolboxes
  docs/examples.md    — annotated example walkthroughs
  README.md           — quickstart and CLI usage

Script extension: .rlab   Run: rustlab run script.rlab   REPL: rustlab

Builtin docs from the shell:
  rustlab docs              list every builtin grouped by category
  rustlab docs <name>       detail for one builtin (e.g. rustlab docs eig)
  rustlab docs <category>   list one category (e.g. rustlab docs Plotting)
  rustlab docs --search <q> substring match over names and briefs
  rustlab docs --json       complete index as JSON (~250 entries with name,
                            category, brief, detail) — recommended for AI
                            tooling that wants a one-call authoritative dump
